records.ety: [L. abominatus, p. p. or abominari to deprecate as ominous, to abhor, to curse; ab + omen a foreboding. See Omen.]
records.morph: [imp. & p. p. Abominated; p. pr. & vb. n. Abominating.]

defs: To turn from as ill-omened; to hate in the highest degree, as if with religious dread; loathe; as, to abominate all impiety.
